creator: henry.hu.sh@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 179839
port description

This new port provides other tables for Fcitx. Different from chinese/fcitx-table-extra, this mainly contains tables which are non-Chinese. For example, it contains a table for emoji.

The port is mostly copied from fcitx-table-extra.

From official website:

fcitx-table-other provides some other tables for Fcitx, fork from ibus-table-others, scim-tables.

Most of the table in this package is non-Chinese table. They are listed under /tables by language.

The package is released under GPLv3+.
